prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持 续后移的大趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、本省考生总数略有增加、学校声誉中性无额外热度催化，以及物理类招生专业以师范和基础学科为主、缺乏高热工科专业吸引高分考生等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 19804 名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约 19904 名，区间 19404–20404 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10819→14694→16434→20437→19804, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9000 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 19804, slightly forward by about 633 places compared to 2024, but still in the high range of recent years; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province Physics Category was 15 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 20 in 2025, and 20 in 2026, with 2026 unchanged from 2025, no expansion or contraction, and the plan factor has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is approximately 79th in 2026, stable in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level national key normal university; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; the overall ranking of Douyin school popularity is 70th, rated as average, short video exposure is at a medium level, with no obvious signs of increased application attention; no record of admission cutoff line breaks in recent years; Psychology A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Sports Science A-, with outstanding strength in normal disciplines; among the enrollment majors, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal) corresponds to the Mathematics discipline (not separately rated), Network Engineering/Information Engineering corresponds to Computer/Electronic Information categories (social popularity is hot to highly recommended), Materials Chemistry/Biotechnology/Bioengineering correspond to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials category (social popularity is clearly discouraged).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended in 2026 social popularity, but South China Normal University's enrollment in Liaoning Physics Category mainly includes normal, materials, and biology majors, with few popular engineering majors; normal/education popularity is divided and wait-and-see; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 200,000, slightly increased compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 199,700), competition slightly intensifies, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 367, with little fluctuation in recent years; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, far from Liaoning Province, belonging to cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, neutral school reputation without additional popularity catalysts, and the fact that Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly normal and basic disciplines, lacking high-heat engineering majors to attract high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 19804. The predicted minimum ranking is about 19904, with a range of 19404–20404.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19404–20404, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19000), you can focus on sprinting for Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal) or Network Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 20000), you should mainly rely on Educational Technology as a safety net. Note that Materials Chemistry, Biotechnology, and Bioengineering belong to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials category, with social popularity clearly discouraged; before applying, you need to carefully consider personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 2351 → 4299 → 3632 → 3498 → 3914. After a sharp drop to 4299 in 2022, it rebounded somewhat, with a baseline of about 3914 in 2025, which is about 416 places lower than the 2024 ranking of 3498. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 15 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 15 in 2025, and 15 in 2026. The 2026 plan is unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, so the plan factor has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with stable rankings in recent years, placing it as a mid-to-upper tier national key normal university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin (TikTok) school popularity ranks 70th overall, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure. There have been no recent records of admission cutoff line drops. Its disciplines include Psychology A+ (top nationally), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, and Physical Education A-. Among the majors in the History Category, Law corresponds to the Law discipline (social popularity is divided and wait-and-see), Communication corresponds to Journalism and Communication (social popularity is clearly discouraged), Social Work corresponds to Sociology (not separately rated), and Logistics Management/Tourism Management correspond to Business Administration/Tourism Management (social popularity is clearly discouraged/divided and wait-and-see).

专业热度与地域.text: Law has divided and wait-and-see social popularity; Communication/Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged; Tourism Management/Business Administration are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in this province is about 200,000, a slight increase from 2025 (History Category + Science Category about 199,700), leading to slightly intensified competition. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 437 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, which is far from Liaoning Province, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in this province, neutral school reputation, and the fact that among the History Category majors, Law has divided popularity while Communication/Tourism Management have low popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decrease from the 2025 baseline of 3914. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3964, with a range of 3464–4464.
